" " JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. AND AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES, FOR $1,775.00 RENTS/DAMAGES, FORFEITURE OF THE RENTAL AGREEMENT AND COSTS AS PER COST BILL. EXHIBIT W/DRAWN. PLTF. PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STERIO, VIRGINIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2143 POWELL STREET, SF, CA $1,775.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,775.00, LEASE FORFEITED, AND COSTS AS PER COST BILL.
